# AI Usage Log

This file documents how AI tools were used in this project, as required by the course.

---

## Session 1 – Initial project generation

**Tool used:** Claude (claude-sonnet-4-6) via Claude Code CLI

**Prompts used:**
- CLAUDE.md was written by the student and used as the system prompt throughout the session
- "ok so go ahead lets create"

**Files generated by AI:**
- `app.py` – all routes and auth logic
- `models.py` – database schema and init function
- `templates/` – all HTML templates
- `static/style.css` – basic CSS
- `README.md` – setup and documentation

**What was reviewed / what to verify:**
- Passwords are hashed with `werkzeug.security.generate_password_hash` (not plaintext)
- All authorization checks use server-side decorators (`@login_required`, `@admin_required`)
- All form inputs are validated on the server before database writes
- SQL queries use parameterized statements (`?` placeholders), not string concatenation

**Known limitations / security notes for analysis team:**
- `secret_key` in `app.py` is hardcoded – should be an environment variable in production
- No CSRF protection on forms (Flask-WTF not used to keep scope small)
- No rate limiting on login endpoint
- SQLite file is stored in `instance/` directory

---

*Update this file whenever you use AI assistance going forward.*
